problem: What enzyme or organism efficiently degrades all plastic types at scale?
hypothesis: Liquid crystal elastomer actuation may resolve What enzyme or organism efficiently degrades all plastic types at scale? by activating at the molecular level.

experiment.protocol: Mechanical testing (tensile, fatigue) with 25 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: Nature uses only the longest threads to weave her patterns. — Richard Feynman
